description: The Giglio are a 'ndrina (criminal clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Strongoli, Calabria, Italy. They are involved in international drug trafficking, usury, arms trafficking, money laundering, and control of the local economy. They have been allied with other 'ndrine such as Grande Aracri and Farao-Marincola. The clan was involved in a feud with the Valente family in the early 2000s and was targeted in the 2018 Operation Stige.

country_links.evidence_quote: In Germania imponevano i loro prodotti vinicoli e i semilavorati per la pizza
country_links.context: The Giglio clan imposed their wine and pizza products in Germany.
